---
title: "Upload Accounting Vendors"
description: "Upload up to 500 accounting vendors in a single batch."
api: "POST https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/accounting/vendors"
---

Upload up to 500 vendors in an all-or-nothing batch.

## Request

<ParamField body="vendors" type="array" required>
  <Expandable title="vendors[]">
    <ParamField body="id" type="string" required>Your ERP's unique ID for this vendor.</ParamField>
    <ParamField body="name" type="string" required>Vendor name.</ParamField>
    <ParamField body="code" type="string">Vendor code from the ERP system.</ParamField>
  </Expandable>
</ParamField>
